programmes.show_name: The Butcher: Hidden in My House
programmes.show_description: First-hand accounts from survivors sharing terrifying stories of intruders secretly living in their homes. A stranger in Brittany's home plans to use her in medical experiments. (Ep1)
In Swindon, 60-year-old Tom Rogers was brutally stabbed by a stranger. Investigators piece together every shred of evidence to see whether the killer has attacked before.
On July 4, 2017 Jorge Rodriguez is shot while buying tomatoes for a family event in Washington. He dies seeking help. Days later, 17-year-old Pedro Cardenas is arrested after a tip-off.
Following the army of enforcers patrolling the streets, hunting down drivers for vehicle violations, including operations across from the Isle of Skye and in Surrey. (Ep1)
Rachel moves in with Monica after leaving her fiance at the altar. Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to embrace bachelorhood once again.
...the End. Ross discovers that his ex-wife is pregnant with their child. Monica's dinner for her overprotective parents is a disaster.

...Laundry Detergent. While Phoebe and Chandler end their respective relationships, Rachel and Ross have their first date - doing the laundry.
Joey gets sacked for overacting in his new film role - as a stand-in for Al Pacino's bottom. Ross abandons his conservative lifestyle.
When a power failure strikes the city, Chandler finds himself stranded in the lobby of a bank with only a gorgeous model for company.
The whole gang attends the funeral when Ross and Monica's grandmother dies. Meanwhile, Chandler's co-worker sets him up on a date - with another man.
A wayward Jack Russell is ruining the relationship between a little girl and her grandad. And Graeme Hall revisits a couple whose pair of puppy sisters have returned to warring ways.
Graeme Hall revisits furry dictator Dave, a Saint Bernard, to address a new power struggle. And Kerry's troublesome Yorkie Teddy is keeping her prisoner in her own home.
...What Happened Next? Graeme Hall meets Labrador party animals Winston and Harland, whose non-stop shenanigans are out of control. In Bath, Graeme meets Lupo who's going loco again.
In an episode focusing on young drivers, a silver Astra leads Dan on a 100mph chase down before U-turning into oncoming traffic.
In an episode focusing on shoplifters, Julian pursues the users of a getaway car that crashed, and James arrests the same man twice.
Police armed with tasers take part in an operation to arrest a man accused of assaulting a pregnant woman, and a car hits 80mph in a 30 zone before crashing.
The Traffic Cops come up against some of the most dangerous and vicious criminals operating on their North Yorkshire patch.
Crime documentary series. In this episode, interceptor Barry outsmarts a disqualified driver and Carl makes a jaw-dropping discovery when he pulls a car over in the early hours.
Barry hunts a lad wanted for assault, the police are on the tail of a suspected drug dealer and a drink driver tries everything to avoid giving a breath sample.
A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, and Sarah Capes gives a bad boy biker an early birthday present.
Jim Woolerton goes hot on the trail of a speeding motorcyclist and Jon Moon reveals his guilty pleasure when he retrieves a stolen caravan. (S8 Ep )
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
Exploring the world of male and female strippers from social media performances to arena tours, including a look at striptease classes and the CCTV used on club premises.
Boozed-up Britain at its worst, from a bouncer racially abused by a clubber to a roadside rumble between a late-night drinker and a taxi driver whose car has been damaged.
After falling in love with fellow widower Ian Stewart, author Helen Bailey thought she'd found her happy ending. But as she was planning their wedding, he was plotting her murder.
Dr Emma McMullen has a painful nail condition to diagnose; Dr Natalia Spierings tries to figure out why a shoulder lump is oily; and Dr Adil Sheraz deals with a mole on a mole.
A global internet outage causes systems to go down so the team are back to basics. In paediatrics, Henry, has fallen off a climbing and shattered his front teeth.

Novice caravan salesman Ant starts a new life on the Costa del Sol, Kiki battles the blues, Kaye opens a pet superstore, and Beckii and Simon face a new family challenge.
Jojo and Bambi take a big risk for their caravan venture, Mark and Lisa squeeze in some Benidorm fun, and tribute singer Ben swaps Gary Barlow for Neil Diamond.
...What Happened Next? Graeme deals with a turf war between a pair of St Bernard's and a Cockapoo. And in Eastbourne, a Welsh Terrier doesn't appear to like to be beside the seaside.
North of York, Julian is called to the site of a fatal car crash. The cops also disturb two break-in suspects. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
An elderly lady has collapsed in her bathroom, jamming the door shut. An elderly man is caught driving without his glasses. Observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
A serious five-car crash requires an airlift to hospital for the worst-hit driver. An un-MOT'd car flees cops at 100mph.
The Interceptors are outnumbered and potentially outmuscled when they stop a coach load of cage fighters following an anonymous tip that there are drugs on board.
Kev and Steve go on the hunt for heroin dealers and uncover a shocking way to rewire your house, while dog handler Liam attends the scene of an arson attack.
Justin and Paul chase down a gang of suspected car thieves. It takes seven interceptors to stop a violent thief who tries to sink his teeth into them.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty. (Ep 11)
Cash is shut out. Jo picks a side. Harper lashes out.
Sonny and Remi lock horns. David has a new lead. Jo supports Tane.
Reality series. When a patient suffering from chronic vertigo enters his surgery, Dr Laird leaps into action. Dr Shah uses a tuning fork to assess a man's tinnitus.
The hospital is in the middle of one of the worst storms in decades, but that doesn't stop casualty being busy. It's not long before paramedics bring in the storm's first victim.
A 64-year-old man collapses at work with a suspected cardiac arrest, and paramedics rush to help a woman trapped in her car after crashing into a fallen tree.
A motorcyclist is rushed in for an emergency operation to stop internal bleeding; a doctor treats a patient run over by a car that she herself had just been in.
The team's new dermatologist Dr Magnus Lynch specialises in facial surgery and makes an explosive start with a large jawline cyst. Plus, a man with infectious warts.
